inputs.label: Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: Age you want to achieve full retirement (or stop part-time work).

businessContext_i18n.en: Age you want to achieve full retirement (or stop part-time work).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam emekliliğe (veya yarı zamanlı çalışmayı bırakmaya) ulaşmak istediğiniz yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter, in dem Sie den vollen Ruhestand erreichen (oder die Teilzeitarbeit beenden) möchten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel vous souhaitez atteindre la retraite complète (ou arrêter le travail à temps partiel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad a la que desea alcanzar la jubilación completa (o dejar el trabajo a tiempo parcial).

inputs.label: Current Savings
inputs.businessContext: Total savings and investments for retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total savings and investments for retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik için toplam birikim ve yatırımlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtersparnisse und Investitionen für den Ruhestand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épargne et investissements totaux pour la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ahorros e inversiones totales para la jubilación.

inputs.label: Monthly Savings
inputs.businessContext: Amount you save each month for retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you save each month for retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik için her ay biriktirdiğiniz miktar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie jeden Monat für den Ruhestand sparen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous épargnez chaque mois pour la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que ahorra cada mes para la jubilación.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Average annual return on investments after inflation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average annual return on investments after inflation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enflasyon sonrası yatırımların ortalama yıllık getirisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche jährliche Rendite der Investitionen nach Inflation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement annuel moyen des investissements après inflation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento anual promedio de las inversiones después de la inflación.

inputs.label: Safe Withdrawal Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of portfolio you can withdraw annually without depleting it.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of portfolio you can withdraw annually without depleting it.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Portföyünüzü tüketmeden yıllık olarak çekebileceğiniz yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Portfolios, den Sie jährlich entnehmen können, ohne es zu erschöpfen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du portefeuille que vous pouvez retirer annuellement sans l'épuiser.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la cartera que puede retirar anualmente sin agotarla.

inputs.label: Annual Expenses in Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual living expenses in retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual living expenses in retirement.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses annuelles de vie prévues à la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos anuales esperados durante la jubilación.

inputs.label: Annual Part-Time Income
inputs.businessContext: Annual income from part-time work in retirement (Barista FIRE).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual income from part-time work in retirement (Barista FIRE).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilikte yarı zamanlı çalışmadan elde edilen yıllık gelir (Barista FIRE).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Einkommen aus Teilzeitarbeit im Ruhestand (Barista FIRE).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel du travail à temps partiel à la retraite (Barista FIRE).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso anual por trabajo a tiempo parcial en la jubilación (Barista FIRE).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
